title: Build an Autonomous AI Engineering Team with OpenClaw + Anti-Gravity
description: Wire OpenClaw to Google's Anti-Gravity for free access to powerful models like Gemini and Opus 4.5, creating specialized AI agents for coding tasks.

cards.title: Build Your AI Engineering Team
cards.body: You'll learn to wire OpenClaw to Google's Anti-Gravity, creating autonomous AI agents that can code, debug, and deploy apps using powerful models like Opus 4.5 and Gemini — all for free. This setup turns your computer into a command center for specialized AI agents.

cards.title: Understanding the Architecture
cards.body: This setup creates a powerful division of labor between two AI systems.

analogy.text: Think of OpenClaw as the CEO making strategic decisions, while Anti-Gravity is like having specialized departments (coding, reviewing, debugging) that execute the work.

bullets: OpenClaw: Handles planning, orchestration, and task routing
Anti-Gravity: Provides free access to powerful models and specialist agents
Result: Autonomous agents that can build entire applications from prompts

cards.title: Check Prerequisites
cards.body: Before we start, make sure you have these requirements ready.
bullets: Node.js 22 or higher installed
A Google account (free)
Anti-Gravity installed for your OS (Mac, Windows, or Linux)
Access to a terminal/command prompt
cards.warn: OpenClaw poses security risks as it can execute code on your machine. Consider using a VM or sandbox environment.

cards.title: Install OpenClaw Globally
cards.body: Install OpenClaw using npm to make it available system-wide.
cards.codeCaption: This installs OpenClaw globally so you can run it from anywhere

cards.title: Enable Anti-Gravity Plugin
cards.body: Enable the Anti-Gravity OAuth plugin in OpenClaw to connect with Google's models.
cards.codeCaption: This enables the plugin that lets OpenClaw connect to Anti-Gravity

cards.title: Login with Google OAuth
cards.body: Authenticate your Google account to access Anti-Gravity's free models.
cards.codeCaption: Follow the OAuth flow to connect your Google account
helpItems: Alternative: Use Gemini CLI OAuth or Vertex ADC
Your account will be verified in the terminal

cards.title: Quick Security Check
cards.question: Why is OpenClaw considered a security risk?

options.text: It only works with Google accounts
It can execute code directly on your local machine
It sends data to third parties

cards.correctFeedback: Exactly! OpenClaw has local code execution capabilities, which is why VM/sandbox usage is recommended.
cards.wrongFeedback: OpenClaw's main risk is its ability to execute code directly on your machine - consider using a secure environment.

cards.title: Run OpenClaw Onboarding
cards.body: Start the onboarding process to configure your AI agent setup.
cards.codeCaption: This launches the interactive setup wizard
cards.warn: You'll see a security warning - read it carefully and understand the risks before proceeding.

source.author: WorldofAI
source.description: Walking through the OpenClaw onboarding process

cards.title: Configure Your Provider
cards.body: During onboarding, set Anti-Gravity as your model provider and choose your preferred model.
bullets: Keep existing OAuth values when prompted
Select Google Anti-Gravity as your provider
Choose your model (Opus 4.5 Thinking, Gemini, etc.)
Pick a communication channel (WhatsApp, CLI, etc.)
cards.safe: The onboarding wizard will guide you through each step with clear prompts.

cards.title: Core Setup Complete!
cards.body: You've successfully connected OpenClaw to Anti-Gravity with OAuth authentication. Your AI command center is ready for specialist agents.

cards.title: Install Anti-Gravity Agent Kit
cards.body: Add specialist agents for specific tasks like building, reviewing, and debugging.
cards.codeCaption: This unlocks specialist agents you can call with slash commands
bullets: Builder: Creates and scaffolds applications
Reviewer: Analyzes and improves code quality
Debugger: Identifies and fixes issues
UX Designer: Optimizes user experience

cards.title: Using Your Agent Command Center
cards.body: OpenClaw now acts as your orchestration layer, routing tasks to specialized Anti-Gravity agents.
bullets: Send commands through your chosen channel (WhatsApp, CLI, etc.)
OpenClaw analyzes the task and routes it to the right specialist
Anti-Gravity agents execute with access to powerful models
Results are refined and iterated automatically
cards.safe: The agents work together - you don't need to manually coordinate between them.

cards.title: Browse Claw Hub for Skills
cards.body: Explore the community marketplace for additional capabilities and install useful skills.
bullets: Visit Claw Hub through your OpenClaw dashboard
Browse skills like quota checker, image generation, etc.
Install skills using the npx commands shown
Configure skills from the dashboard

cards.title: Test Your Setup
cards.body: Send your first task to verify everything is working correctly.
bullets: Send a simple coding request through your chosen channel
Watch as OpenClaw routes the task to Anti-Gravity
Observe the specialist agents collaborating
Verify the output meets your requirements
troubleshoot: If authentication fails, re-run the OAuth login
Check that your selected model is available
Verify your communication channel is properly configured

source.author: WorldofAI
source.description: Demonstration of the complete workflow in action

cards.title: Workflow Understanding
cards.question: In this setup, what is Anti-Gravity's primary role?

options.text: Providing free model access and specialist execution

cards.correctFeedback: Perfect! Anti-Gravity provides the models and specialist agents, while OpenClaw handles orchestration.
cards.wrongFeedback: Remember: OpenClaw orchestrates, Anti-Gravity executes with specialized agents and powerful models.

cards.title: Advanced Automation Options
cards.body: Take your setup further with automated workflows and scheduled tasks.
bullets: Cron Jobs: Schedule regular tasks to run automatically
Specialized Commands: Create custom workflows for repeated tasks
Multi-Agent Collaboration: Chain different specialists together
Continuous Integration: Integrate with your development workflow
cards.safe: Start simple and gradually add more automation as you become comfortable with the system.

cards.title: Your AI Engineering Team is Ready!
cards.body: You've successfully created an autonomous AI engineering team that combines OpenClaw's orchestration with Anti-Gravity's powerful models and specialist agents. You can now build, review, debug, and deploy applications through simple prompts, all running locally with free access to cutting-edge AI models.
